name: fpl-skills
description: Flagship workflow plugin for the ForgePlan ecosystem. 33 engineering skills + dev-advisor agent + 5 hooks (+ smith greeting). v1.31.0: EPIC-002 PRD-063/064 — 4 new smith skills (/smith default master-orchestrator entrypoint, /smith-bootstrap greenfield onboarding, /smith-plan per-task plan with 12-context classification, /smith-routing educational walkthrough), 5 new templates (smith-plan, smith-bootstrap, smith-handoff, post-mortem, routing-decision), session-start.sh smith greeting (3 states, <50ms), 5 READMEs + SMITH-TEMPLATES guide, AGENT-AUTHORING-GUIDE Profile B-orchestrator sub-profile. v1.29.0: Sprint Z10 PRD-061 — /methodology-check. v1.28.1: Sprint Z9 PRD-060 — c4-diagram Dispatch mode. v1.28.0: Sprint Z8 PRD-058 — /supersede + delta-spec. v1.27.0: Sprint Z5 PRD-056 — /decay-watch 4-source + NOTE-013.
